title: sciodaphyllum calycinum
intro: Sciodaphyllum calycinum, also known as the "Guarea" or "Guácimo," is a plant species in the family Annonaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to possess medicinal value. The health benefits of Sciodaphyllum calycinum include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and combat infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for various therapeutic applications.
